MODULE: cosmos.integration.chain_memory.protected.compile
FILE: cosmos/integration/chain_memory/protected/compile.py (229 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Compile Protected Core Module

This script compiles the core.py module to prevent source code distribution.
The compiled .pyd/.so file should be distributed instead of the source.

Methods available:
1. Cython - Compiles to C extension (.pyd on Windows, .so on Linux)
2. PyArmor - Obfuscates Python b

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def compile_cython()
- def compile_pyarmor()
- def compile_nuitka()
- def create_stub()
- def main()
